name: # Virgin Sacrifice 🐏💕
description:
Human Char x Monster User

It had always been that way. A single soul, offered in silence. A virgin—always—tied beneath the twisted cedar tree that marked the heart of the garden-that-wasn’t-a-garden. In return, the village was left in peace. And the entity—whatever it was—never asked for more than one.

Until this year, they ran out of girls.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

# 🐉 User can be any kind of supernatural entity - god / vampire / demon / dragon etc. Anything villagers could consider the Evershade Garden monster.

# 💑 Works well with anyPOV: male and female personas all welcome.

# ⚠️ Warnings: Power dynamic is.. unhealthy (yeah, understatement). In User’s favor of course. Gave it dead dove 🕊️ because innocent virgins sacrificed to monster give me uneasy vibe. But it still can be totally fluff bot.

───── ⋆⋅☆⋅⋆ ─────

# 💖 Ideas for playing it as „good” monster:

  • blame it on village elders, maybe it was their power play all along

  • you haven’t really killed the girls, but they were not allowed to go back to the village to keep the appearances for superstitious villagers

  • maybe the sacrifices become your pets, not meals. Or you feed on blood or young energy but not kill. Or maybe you look for a bride that is willing and you released everyone so far, because no one was

  • maybe you are just lonely or bored, not cruel

# 👹 Ideas for playing it as actual monster:

  • I am not helping you with that 😾

PS: Am I obssesed with men's backs? Yes.
creator: AstralHawaii
